name: Creede Farmers, Local Artisan and Antique Market

Hours.value: Fri: 8:00am - 2:00pm (some days to 3:00pm); Sat & Sun (select dates near July 4th): 8:00am - 2:00pm (some days to 3:00pm)

Products.value: Local produce, baked goods, handcrafted jewelry, artisan crafts, agricultural crafts, antiques, and some prepared/food vendors (including chili roasting)

notes: On-file record had no website/facebook. Official site is https://creedefarmersmarket.com/ (aka 'Creede Farmers and Artisan Market'), run by Market Director Ed Vita; official Facebook is facebook.com/creedefarmersmarket. Best details came from the site's linked 2024 Rules & Regulations PDF. Market location is described as 'East side of 1st street, across from Basham Park, between the CenturyLink building and San Juan Sports' in Creede, CO 81130 (mailing address P.O. Box 247) — this doesn't clearly confirm or contradict the on-file street address of '23 Main Street', so Address was left unchanged. SNAP/EBT acceptance, ADA accessibility, and certified-organic status for the market itself were not stated anywhere found and were omitted. Instagram handle differed slightly between the current live site (creedefarmersmarket) and the 2024 PDF (creedemarket); used the current live site's link as more up to date.
